evidence.description: CRIT-300 PROP-FEED-S6-001 5-row truth table (cell 1 effectiveMount=true, EC-FEED-024 row, cell 2/3/4) maps to REQ-FEED-030.1; PROP-FEED-S6-003 grep audit uses portable POSIX [[:space:]] (iter2-005 verified).
CRIT-301/302 cite REQ-FEED-030.1 / EC-FEED-024 / REQ-FEED-034.1/2 with concrete PROP IDs S6-002/004/005/006/007 — each criterion is binary-evaluable.

fast-check numRuns ≥ 500 with seed 0x56BABE (iter2-004 verified) and 5-key per-cell stratification asserted via toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(50) (iter2-003 verified). EC-FEED-021 MutationObserver deferral is documented in adversary calibration with explicit openDeferrals slot.
PROP-FEED-S6-007 documented as orthogonal to S6-001 EC-FEED-024 row (static DOM absence vs dynamic dispatch 0-calls), preventing reviewer from collapsing them.

CRIT-302 splits behavioral click routing into 3 independent assertions (PROP-S6-004 cell 3 dispatchSelectPastNote 1 call; PROP-S6-005 cell 1 .feed-row direct click 0 calls; PROP-S6-006 cell 1 block-element click → onRowClick 0 + dispatchFocusBlock 1). FIND-S6-CONTRACT-001 double-counting against CRIT-300 is resolved by routing structural truth-table to CRIT-300 and behavior to CRIT-302.

Production-vs-test/config file scoping clarified at line 19 (iter2-001 verified). Bun test passThreshold breakdown is precise: 1901 pass + 4 skip + 4 todo + 0 fail = 1909 (iter2-002 verified). Single LOW non-blocking inconsistency in CRIT-301 description prose (250 vs passThreshold 500) — operative gate is passThreshold so grading-readiness preserved.

CRIT-304 git diff regex enumerates exact allowed paths (FeedRow.svelte production + test files + VCSDD artifacts + vitest.config.ts/bunfig.toml + supersession test edits + main-route-wiring.dom.vitest.ts). Exit-1 on unauthorized hits is binary.

phase2 gate distinguishes failing tests (RED required: PROP-S6-001/002/007) from regression guards (PROP-S6-003/004/005/006). phase3 gate sets pure-module ≥95% branch coverage and 0 counter-example for fast-check seed 0x56BABE. phase5 gate references verification-architecture.md §Sprint 6 Phase 5 gate.
